explanation: Interprocedural analysis infers richer contracts (return-type refinements) but does not reduce false positives on this benchmark because the guard harvester already handles most cases intraproceduallry. The value of interprocedural analysis is in contract inference for downstream consumers, not in FP reduction.

contracts_inferred.validate_config: returns {v: Any | v is not None}
contracts_inferred.safe_divide: returns {v: Any | v is not None}

note: Z3 is used for all subtype checks in both analyses
